📍 Queens / Nassau, NY Northwell Health 3/5 CMS rating

Northwell Long Island Jewish Medical Center is in our dataset, but no procedures from our shoppable set had a published cash price as of the last refresh.

Compare Northwell Long Island Jewish Medical Center to peers.

Open the comparison →

CMS quality rating.

3/5 stars on CMS Hospital Care Compare. Based on ~50 measures of safety, mortality, readmission, patient experience, and timeliness. View on Care Compare ↗

About this data.

The prices above are pulled directly from Northwell Long Island Jewish Medical Center's machine-readable file (MRF), required under the Hospital Price Transparency Rule (45 CFR 180.50). We download the file, parse the rows for our shoppable CPT set, and publish the dollar amounts as the hospital published them. No surveys, no estimates.

Cash-pay rates are what an uninsured patient would be charged. Insurance-negotiated rates vary by payer and plan; pick a payer in the comparison tool to see plan-specific numbers.

Data sources: CMS Hospital Price Transparency rule (45 CFR 180.50). CMS Hospital Care Compare (xubh-q36u). Last refresh: 2026-04-27.
A consumer reading of CMS-mandated MRF data. Not medical or financial advice. Itemized · itemized.health
